children.heading: Requirement for inventories of software licenses
children.label: a Requirement for inventories of software licenses

children.text: conduct an inventory of all existing software licenses of such element, including utilized and unutilized licenses;

children.label: A
children.text: increasing the centralization of the management of software licenses;

children.label: B
children.text: increasing the regular tracking and maintaining of comprehensive inventories of software licenses using automated discovery and inventory tools and metrics;

children.label: C
children.text: analyzing software license data to inform investment decisions; and

children.label: D
children.text: providing appropriate personnel with sufficient software licenses management training; and
submit to the Chief Information Officer of the Intelligence Community each inventory required by paragraph (1) and each assessment required by paragraph (2).

children.heading: Inventories by the Chief Information Officer of the Intelligence Community
children.label: b Inventories by the Chief Information Officer of the Intelligence Community

children.text: compile an inventory of all existing software licenses of the intelligence community, including utilized and unutilized licenses;

children.label: A
children.text: increasing the centralization of the management of software licenses;

children.label: B
children.text: increasing the regular tracking and maintaining of comprehensive inventories of software licenses using automated discovery and inventory tools and metrics;

children.label: C
children.text: analyzing software license data to inform investment decisions; and

children.label: D
children.text: providing appropriate personnel with sufficient software licenses management training; and

based on the assessment required under paragraph (2), make such recommendations with respect to software procurement and usage to the Director of National Intelligence as the Chief Information Officer considers appropriate.

children.heading: Reports to Congress
children.label: c Reports to Congress
children.text: The Chief Information Officer of the Intelligence Community shall submit to the congressional intelligence committees a copy of each inventory compiled under subsection (b)(1).

children.heading: Implementation of recommendations
children.label: d Implementation of recommendations
children.text: Not later than 180 days after the date on which the Director of National Intelligence receives recommendations from the Chief Information Officer of the Intelligence Community in accordance with subsection (b)(3), the Director of National Intelligence shall, to the extent practicable, issue guidelines for the intelligence community on software procurement and usage based on such recommendations.
